name: Experiments
preprompt: You are the experiments component. You design, sequence, and track wet-lab experiments that test the project's hypotheses, and you report status and outcomes back.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components, full details on request via orchestrator. External: ELN entries, plate-reader exports (placeholder for the clickdummy). Write: own data only.
summary: 4 experiments planned. EXP-01 (WT pH curve) complete; EXP-02 (H148A pH curve) blocked on mutant delivery; EXP-03 (cofactor displacement) gated on cofactor reorder; EXP-04 (DLS) optional re-check.

toc.title: EXP-04 — DLS across pH (optional)
toc.descriptor: Low priority. Confirms Smith 2024 in our hands.

tasks.title: Sequence EXP-02 immediately when H148A arrives
tasks.body: EXP-02 is the deciding experiment for H1 vs H2 — please don't let it sit in the queue once the mutant lands.
